```json
                  "content": "Added a new Editor Viewport Depth Bar that provides visual control over those planes.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "FDateTimeStructCustomization now has a tooltip. Hovering over a DateTime property's text box in the editor provides a hint at the format.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Disabled use of a Template SoundWave, can be re-enabled in Editor Preferences-&gt;Audio Editor Per Project Settings.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Switched to camera-relative vertical panning by default. Add an option for world-based vertical panning.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Waveform Editor:  Instated Waveform editor as the default SoundWave editor.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Splits viewport panning logic so that the middle mouse button and the left+right mouse button gestures are distinct. Middle mouse can be camera relative (and continues to be so by default) while left+right mouse button always move up and down.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Outliner: Added visibility function versions that work on the selected actor's hierarchy and set H to default to toggle selected hierarchy.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Asset Picker Size Scaling as Editor Preference: Added the Editor Setting \"Scale Asset Picker Widget Size\" to allow the size of asset pickers to be scaled up or down.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a new \"Toggle Selected Actor Visibility\" command & behavior. This command takes the default \"H\" binding from \"Hide Selected Actors\". The command:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Hides selected actors if any actors in the selection are visible.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Shows selected actors if all actors in the selection are hidden.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Does not affect selection.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Show template projects from all plugins:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Problem:",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "New Project dialog only listed template projects from enabled plugins Users couldn't see or start from templates included in installed but disabled plugins.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Empty/invalid background image paths in template categories showed broken visuals",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Solution:",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Updated search to include template projects from all discovered plugins Added warning icon + tooltip for templates from disabled plugins.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Selecting a disabled plugin template shows a warning/error box that the plugin is not enabled.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Warning is non-blocking (no modal), project creation proceeds after user confirmation.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Notes:",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Keeps behavior lightweight.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Surfaces risk (no additional modal asking to confirm creation) but doesn't block flow.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Ensured that the \"Hide Selected At Startup\" action now correctly applies to all selected actors, regardless of their current visibility state. Previously, actors that were already hidden were skipped by this action. With this change, both visible and non-visible actors will be consistently marked to start hidden on load.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    }
  ],
  "excerpt_hash_id": "1751",
  "settings": {
    "is_hidden": false
  }
}
```

```json
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Foundation",
      "level": 3,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Build",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "AssetManager, AssetRegistry: Add Property AffectsCookRule to ManageReferences.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Extended the AddExternalImportValidation of missing UClass imports to validate imports of all native types.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for the 'Activate' flag in PluginReferenceDescriptors. This fixes an issue where the 'Activate' flag would be deleted from plugin descriptors when running some UAT programs.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "IncrementalCook is now enabled for DLC cooks, but for DLC cooks it is still experimental and is not yet robust.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "UHT: Added support for engine version comparisons as preprocessor conditions.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Prevented Clang builds for Windows from launching multiple link jobs simultaneously to avoid memory exhaustion.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "DLC Packaging: Fix missing .upluginmanifest when packaging without -DLCPakPluginFile.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "With the plugin manifest present the output folder from a DLC package can be copied into a packaged game as-is and will load through the default plugin discovery and loading process.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "SavePackage: Fix errors in IllegalReferences diagnostic; it now more accurately finds the object and property that caused the illegal reference.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Core",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added UE::CFloatingPoint concept.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added value hashes and sizes to DDC replays",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "RemoteObjects:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Transactional RPCs can be rescheduled per Actor. This means the transaction can abort and try other transactions while we wait for needed dependencies to service the RPC.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "TimerManager now has some limited transactional support.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Exposed GetClass that may skip migrations when used with FRemoteObjectId.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Exposed GetRemoteId() on TWeakObjectPtr",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Distinguished between Loaning out an Object and Reassigning a Borrowed Object. This helps clarify some situations, particularly where you're sending an object and maintaining ownership you can just check if you're Loaning it now, because ReassignBorrowed is now a separate case (which means another server has borrowed it, but you never owned it).",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Allow third-party crash handling to use `FAdditionalCrashContextStack`.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Default WindowsPlatform.bClangStandaloneDebug to true. This slightly increases pdb size when compiling with clang, but improves debugging experience.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "FStateGraph and FStateGraphNode no longer timeout if -NoTimeouts is provided on the command line.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added [[nodiscard]] to mutex functions.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added [[nodiscard]] to TLess, TGreater and TEqualTo.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Optimized TCppStructOps vtables to only include functions that will be called. This now prevents users from making UScriptStruct or TCppStructOps a friend in order to allow your class only constructible by the CoreUObject system.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Refactored FInstancedPropertyBag's CopyMatchingValuesByID function to allow the caller to provide a matching function. Added CopyMatchingValuesByName that matches properties by name instead of ID.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added FRecursiveWordMutex to support very early and/or very late recursive mutex usage.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Removed LLM dependencies on FCriticalSection and FRWLock.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Eliminate static log records in the absence of source location and log tracing to reduce program size.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Made mutating EnumClassFlags functions usable in constexpr contexts.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added UE_LIFETIMEBOUND to TValueOrError.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Exclude trace state when log trace is disabled and optionally compile out source location from logging to reduce program size.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Use Yield() instead of YieldThread() when spinning in mutexes to improve performance under heavy system load.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Optimized ParkingLot::Wait when there is no timeout.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added UE::CContiguousRange and CPointer concepts.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added CCharType concept and applied it in TStringView.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added Max() functions to sets and maps - and TSparseArray which is needed for sets.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Replaced TSortedSet's O(N^2) Append with an O(N) (at best) or O(N log N) (at worst) and added tests.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added some basic TSet tests, based on the existing TMap tests.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Specialized FPlatformManualResetEvent for each platform that we target.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added FOutputDeviceFence to support lifetime management of dynamic log records",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Updated debug visualizers for TDeque, supporting visualisation of elements when the container is set up to use a different allocator such as TInlineAllocator or TFixedAllocator.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Add explicit nullptr constructor/equality operators to TWeakInterfacePtr Mark functions in TWeakInterfacePtr [[nodiscard]]",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed overallocation for unused null terminators in TStringBuilder.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added TFunctionWithContext to adapt a callable into a function pointer and context",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Improve accuracy of GC time limit by setting object destroy granularity to 10 (instead of 100) and provide a way for it to be tweaked per project with gc.IncrementalBeginDestroyGranularity.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Optimized ParkingLot callback code generation",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Updated UE::Core::Private::StringLength to use TCString::Strlen outside of a constant-evaluated context, to speed up compile times with MSVC.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added UE_IF_CONSTEVAL and UE_IF_NOT_CONSTEVAL.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Updated Oodle to 2.9.14.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Used InitializeCriticalSectionAndSpinCount to avoid an extra function call during construction of FWindowsRecursiveMutex.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added CConvertibleTo concept mirroring std::convertible_to.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a configurable intrusive unfair non-recursive mutex.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added TInstancedStruct::NetSerialize function.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Removed contention on root flags when pinning weakobjectptrs.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Improved the logging backlog to minimize the number of missed log lines during the initialization.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added TLogTemplate and control over log template allocation.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added IsLocked and IsLockedShared to the mutex types.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Add Async.ParallelFor.DisableOversubscription which if enabled will only use existing threads which can be faster when cores are saturated.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for nested $format in structured log formatting.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added Intel OneAPI and Microsoft Clang 19 HWPGO integration.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added an ExecFileOverride resource to BootstrapPackagedGame.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Optimized FLazyName to support constant initialization.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Deflate, gzip & lz4hc compressors now honor COMPRESS_BiasSpeed and COMPRESS_BiasSize",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added TExternalStringBuilder and support for TStringBuilder&lt;0&gt;",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Improvements to GameFeaturesSubsystem and FPluginDescriptor:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added a new hook to PluginDescriptor to allow customized loading of uplugin json data.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Updated GFS to ensure that, at least in the editor, we will try to use the PluginManager's copy of the plugin data rather than re-reading it and deserializing it from json ourselves. This is necessary to take advantage of the customized loading.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Enabled custom crash handling for GPU crashes.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Optimization for FSoftObjectPath::ResolveObjectInternal to avoid the round trip to/from string.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Add a console command, core.ResetEnsureState, to reset the ensure state so they fire again. This will cause all non-always ensures to trigger again if they've already been suppressed.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Reduced memory use by FOutputDeviceFile by 992 KiB in the default configuration.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added better error messages when TLess, TGreater and TEqualTo when used with a type without the corresponding operator.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Now validate LinkerSave unmapped objects against the package harvester excluded object list. This removes the limitation of asserting when FindObject is called while GIsSavingPackage is set.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "FPaths:CreateStandardFilename: changed behavior to normalize paths that cannot be standardized: .. is collapsed when possible.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added UE::CNotCVRefTo concept.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Removed dependencies on ParkingLot from Windows stack walking",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Made the MSVC implementations of FPlatformMath::CountLeadingZeros and FPlatformMath::CountTrailingZeros constexpr.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added format string validation to LowLevelFatalError.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added UE::CStringViewable and UE::CCompatibleStringViewable concepts.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "ThinLTO is now enabled by default for Clang based toolchains.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added an experimental plugin, Global Configuration Data, that can be used as a single point of access to data that may be provided from different systems.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Can be used to have console and config data added to blueprints without additional code.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Additional data routers can be registers to expand on what data sources are available to the system.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added UE::CArithmetic concept.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added UE::CCompatibleCharType concept and some usage in TStringView.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added UEOps.h to aid in the correct generation of all binary comparison operators based on a couple of simple member function definitions.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Replaced the UTF8CHAR enum with C++20's char8_t.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added checks for non-trivially-relocatable types being used in containers, particularly FGCObject-derived types.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added UE_REWRITE, a replacement for FORCEINLINE intended to be used on macro-like functions (rather than for optimization) by 'rewriting' a function call as a different expression.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Enabled override max printed reference chains via `gc.MaxReferenceChainsToPrint` Cvar.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "FVector2D deprecated comparison operators (from 5.2 onwards) removed.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Remove deprecated FLinearColor methods, deprecate unused DXT block structs.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Enabled TSharedPtr and TUniquePtr to be usable as keys in sorted containers, and TUniquePtr to be usable as keys in hashed containers.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added std::initializer_list support to TSparseArray.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed UPS cooking indeterminism for TBox[2] structs on stack Make ForceInit constructor zero out padding.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed managed storage handle attempting to resolve an unmanaged file more than once after the manager becomes active.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added UE::CDerivedFrom concept.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added debug visualizers for UE::Math::TVector2&lt;&gt; and FDeprecateSlateVector2D.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Extended `gc.PerformGCWhileAsyncLoading` to provide the option to garbage collect while async loading, only when low memory is detected (based on gc.LowMemory.MemoryThresholdMB).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Package flags are now thread-safe.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Add TargetRules.bIdenticalCodeFolding setting (--icf=all).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added intrusive unset optional support to TNotNull.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a benchmark for mutex types.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added CSameAs and CDecaysTo concepts.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added UE::CIntegral concept.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added tests for Algo::StableRemoveIf.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added configs managing how GenericPlatformMallocCrash handles allocation requests on non-crashing threads, allowing them to permanently suspend on allocs/frees, suspend on allocs and skip frees, or process as normal.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Removed dependency on FCriticalSection and ParkingLot in memory allocators.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Retry in the shared mutex TryLockShared while there is not an exclusive lock.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for joining non-contiguous ranges in TStringBuilder.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for optional sub-object references in localized structured log formatting.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Reduced codegen impact of ensure() macro.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added an overload of CreateLogTemplate that takes the format as FText.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for $locformat in structured log formatting.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added NotNullGet for retrieving the inner value from a TNotNull without an explicit cast.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Experimental Visual Studio 2026 support.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a new experimental API: SpringMath:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This includes some useful functions for critically based spring damping",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added experimental blueprint library for spring math to expose functions to BP",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added SpringMath::ExponentialSmoothingApproxQuat to mirror the existing function FMath::ExponentialSmoothingApprox.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for creating Property Bag Placeholder types for entity prefabs.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This is done via a new table added to package files: ImportTypeHierarchy table.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Each entry of that table contains hierarchical information for every FObjectImport entry that is a type (e.g., UClass).",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This is the second part of a 2 part change. The first change introduced the package file header change along with the object version bump.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This change adds the remaining logic to save/load the new table and the change to use it when creating placeholders.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for AVX10.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added write helpers to RapidJsonUtilsAdded UE::Json::WriteCompact and UE::Json::WritePretty, to write a UE::Json::FDocument to a FString in either compact or pretty form.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added UE::Json::MakeStringRef and UE::Json::MakeStringValue to help convert a FStringView to a UE::Json::FStringRef or UE::Json::FValue when building a JSON DOM.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added some additional aliases to UE::Json that are needed when building a JSON DOM.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Switched UE::Json aliases to use the UE FMemory allocator, rather than rapidjson::CrtAllocator.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added --prioritize-dependency-scanning SN-DBS build option.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added `FNonshrinkingAllocator`, which changes the shrinking policy to No by default.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added hidden MetaData works for base structs in Instanced Structs.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Cooker:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "CookPackageSplitter: Changed the return value of GetGenerateList to a struct (and changed the name to ReportGenerationManifest) so that generators can request that the package containing the generator be not saved.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Deprecated the ability to run the cook inside the editor process when launched from editor. The cook instead should always be executed in a separate invocation of the CookCommandlet. This has been the default since 5.3, and we are now deprecating the ability to change that default and will remove all support for it in 5.9.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added the following commandline arguments:",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "-cookshowremaining",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "-cookshowpackagenames",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "-cookshowinstigators",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "These provide a clearer behavior than -dpcvars=cook.displaymode=1|2|4.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "Each flag can be specified with a value: -cookshowremaining=1|0, or with no value, defaulting to 1: -cookshowremaining.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "These flags override whatever value has been assigned via config or -dpcvars commandline.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Introduced a mechanism for render asset updates to be abandoned by owning `UStreamableRenderAssets` so `UStreamableRenderAssets` can be garbage collected independently (See r.Streaming.EnableAssetUpdateAbandons). Abandoned render assets are ticked during GC or every streaming update if r.Streaming.TickAbandonedRenderAssetUpdatesOnStreamingUpdate is true (defaults to true).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Changed FMonotonicTimeSpan::IsInfinity() to stop matching negative infinity.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed FMath::FindDeltaAngleDegrees and FMath::FindDeltaAngleRadians for input deltas outside [-540, 540] degrees.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "COMPILE_WARNING reports as error when WarningsAsErrors is being used.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a potential infinite loop in the serialization of packed ints when loading malformed values.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fix potential deadlock in the scheduler if a foreground task is scheduling a background one.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fix potential deadlock in object annotations because of 2 different locks used in different order.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Made -VerifyGC and -NoVerifyGc take all verification cvars into account.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed invalid access to memory location error in UnrealBuildTool.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Made sure that pinned UObject are preventing GC of clusters they are part of.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed composite EPackageFlags not being shown in the debugger, caused by non-power-of-two enumerators.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed _GetUObjectPacked intrinsic for debug visualizers. This addresses an issue with visualizers for weak object ptrs not working in builds where UE_ENABLE_FUOBJECT_ITEM_PACKING == 1.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Made TBox's InverseTransformBy and TransformProjectBy both check for box validity before transforming (matching TransformBy).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed issues trying to load redirected native classes using the StreamableManager (and AssetManager).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a bug in GC timing where if it destroyed exactly 100 objects in a frame it could cause a large stall.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed many log categories having a default verbosity higher than their compile-time verbosity.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixing a crash in CppStructOps caused by unloading a dll at an inopportune time resulting in a dangling pointer to a vtable.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed TMemoryWriter IndexSize to be a bit count.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "LaunchEngineLoop: Fixed a copy paste mistake in the error message, it now correctly identifies that it fails to load the Game Engine class instead of the Editor Engine class when instantiating GEngine.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "InstancedStruct: Fixed the operator= when copying from a TConstStructView.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "The loader will now flush any remaining async loads before PreExit to avoid async loading to perform operations past the exit point.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed UE_STATIC_ASSERT_COMPLETE_TYPE for zero-sized arrays.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Enabled seeking to the end of a response body without returning CURL_SEEKFUNC_FAIL in the Curl implementation in DevHttp module.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed UI layout for a particular view of the crash report dialog where the screenshot preview can cover button controls.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed clang miss-leading indentation warnings.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Checked zlib init and shutdown for errors.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Cleaned up usages that expect nullptr_t to be in the global namespace.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed StaticDuplicateObject when Source Object class and Destination class are different.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed crash when loading content from corrupted pak or optional segment files.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Disabled nuget audit for the dotnet Development configuration to prevent unactionable dotnet build errors.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Force synchronous writes on type library input files.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed pipe and task timeout calculations that generated bad code.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Deferred invoking the class initializer on duplicated objects until after subobject instancing has occurred.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Disable 'C4702: unreachable code' when use bUseInlining is disabled.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed potential race condition in FConfigCacheIni::ForPlatform adding plugins without holding the lock.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed text import of delegate properties with full object paths, and made FDelegateProperty consistent with FPropertyMulticastDelegate on text export.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added static_asserts to TValueOrError to ensure that it's not instantiated with references.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a FARFilter with only WithPackageFlags or WithoutPackageFlags set failing to return any assets from IAssetRegistry::GetAssets(...).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Avoid TInstancedStruct::GetPtr/GetMutablePtr and TStructView/TConstStructView::GetPtr crashing when the underlying struct data is incompatible with BaseStructT",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This will now ensure instead, though will still perform the bad cast in a shipping build, so any ensures need to be fixed!",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed TStringView::CopyString for copying an empty range.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fix a missing test of MaybeWaitingFlag in FManualResetEvent before parking the thread.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed Algo::RemoveIf calling the predicate too many times in some cases, and added some tests.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Rehashed map and set properties after instancing key subobjects in their overrides of FProperty::InstanceSubobjects.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Disabled AutoSDK for LowLevelTests targets.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fix thread scheduler to properly apply the cvars TaskGraph.UseDynamicPrioritization, TaskGraph.UseDynamicThreadCreation, and TaskGraph.OversubscriptionRatio which can be used to modify thread performance.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Adding -nocrashreports support for windows. When provided, we will log crashes/ensures/etc but will not perform more complex reporting that could risk hanging on a file pipe.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Reimplemented TVectorRegisterType with partial specializations rather than std::conditional_t to work around alignment issue using Clang on Windows.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Disabled custom property lists during native struct serialization.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a race waking threads in FSharedMutex and FSharedRecursiveMutex.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added workaround for getting an array reference element from an rvalue tuple under MSVC.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Deprecated:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Deprecated Alignment in TStaticArray and fixed UB behavior in it's GetData. Made TArrayView and Invoke constexpr.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Deprecated TSortedMap::GetMaxIndex, fixed TSortedSet::GetMaxIndex and correctly commented TSet::GetMaxIndex and TMap::GetMaxIndex.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Deprecated public and protected ways of initializing TStringBuilderBase from a buffer.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Deprecated member TFunction::CheckCallable which was never intended to be public.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Deprecated TIsConst.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Deprecated PLATFORM_COMPILER_SUPPORTS_CONSTEXPR_BUILTIN_FILE_AND_LINE.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Replaced bExactClass with EFindObjectFlags in the FindObject family of functions.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Deprecated the original log template API.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Delete FCbFieldIterator::MakeOwned() to avoid breaking the iterator.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Dev Tools",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added compile warning argument ordering.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Wildcard support in project sections of UGS ini files.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Improved the summary outputs of UnrealPak. The units of memory now scale with the number of bytes making it easier to read for both smaller and larger containers.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "UBT DefaultBuildSettings:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Build Settings V6 now applied to wundef.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Default Build Settings Updates for Targets - V6 - engine.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "BuildCMakeLib: Added support for building third-party projects with CMake using the Ninja build system.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Adding capabilities to the warning defaults, cleaning up tests, adding more warning+error strings for easier long term adoption & toggling.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "UHT will flag U macros (i.e. UCLASS) found in skipped blocks of code as deprecated. This will be made a warning in a future version of UE.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "UBT Editor: Added graceful messaging for Target upgrade requirements on editor path.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Emit the target build settings version & build environment to target file for editor runtime consumption.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Consume target file metadata to improve error messaging for Target versions.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixing a bug where UAT could hang waiting for output. We now log a warning instead.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Shaders: Fixed the shader pipeline skipping work if the number of shaders to compile is less than the number of tasks available.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue where if a TInstancedStruct is used as a function argument, Clang platforms would fail to compile.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed BuildCookRun to include base build .sig files when generating patches.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Updating UHT to once again generate an error when a USTRUCT contains more than one base.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue in UnrealVS that could cause UnrealVS.P4-&gt;History to open an empty window",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Updated UnrealVS - Includes fixes to test discovery and execution",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Corrected define usage (UE_BUILD_SHIPPING vs UE_SHIPPING)",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed UHT parser issue where if FArchive is forward declared when used in the Serialize function declaration, UHT would fail to generate the proper code.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed inconsistent exception logging in Gauntlet.TestExecutor. It now consistently uses Exception.ToString().",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed issue in UHT where it was allowing a USTRUCT to have multiple USTRUCTs as base classes.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a bug where presets would be added to the global sync filters if the tab with the preset had its sync filter view opened and the okay button pressed.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed UGS not showing investigations as \"resolved\" when using Horde's metadata endpoint.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed destination files potentially not having the correct permission during SafeCopyFile in UAT, on non-Windows platforms.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Horde",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "BuildHealth Server Build: Added JobSummary telemetry.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Hashed issue handler will now automatically check for a file property in the event's structured logging, and use that data in suspect finding. This should lead to suspect changes being identified more accurately, but relies on emitted warnings and errors including file metadata.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Analytics:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added a Build Health Dashboard View that shows step outcome history for selected templates & streams.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
```
