              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Exposed landscape component's GetGrassTypes to Blueprint.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added generic World Partition Landscape Builder Commandlet. Builds all landscape grass maps, physical materials, and nanite components.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Improved landscape.DumpLODs command:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Now it only displays the landscape LOD information by default and -detailed needs to be used to get the verbose mip-to-mip delta information.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added an option to align landscape grass instances with the precise triangle normal when using jittered grid mode.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Also fixed an issue with the triangle normal calculation.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added API exposure to virtual functions on landscape patch plugin UCLASSes so that they can be inherited from in other modules.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Remove redundant and unsafe non-blocking landscape nanite build from PreSave. No longer builds Nanite at all on auto-saves.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added an option to Add Unassigned Blueprint Brushes in the Landscape Edit layer context menu. If a Blueprint brush does not have an assigned edit layer, the right-click context menu will include an option for re-assignment",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a DeleteActors helper in order to let the editor's delete actors dialog run when possible but also to let actors be safely deleted without using the UI in other cases.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added Landscape Edit Layer Context Menu customization system.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added the ability to easily extend right-click context menu actions for custom edit layer classes.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Moved LandscapePatch plugin out of Experimental.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "UX improvements:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Updated icons to landscape target layers display order methods.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added sort type (ascending/descending) for this.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The sort/filter options have moved next to filter box within the Layers property (since they affect only the layers that are visible, these buttons should not be present when the property is collapsed).",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added a number of target layers in the Layers property header, in order to be similar to standard arrays and also the edit layers property above.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added Collapse All Edit Layers action to the Edit Layer context menu.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Removes all edit layers and flattens the current data into the default edit layer.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Updated default spline edit layer selection behavior:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Selecting the Splines Edit Layer no longer auto-activates the Splines tool.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Double-Click on the Splines layer, or use the right-click context menu option, to toggle between the Splines Tool and last active tool.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed mobile landscape weightmaps not being taken into account by streaming.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash when auto-filling target layers from material.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed height/weight alpha precision loss when merging landscape.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed grid-alignment warnings when creating a landscape with more than one region worth of components.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added refined Water Body underwater detection to avoid applying post-processing when the camera is underneath or outside the bounds of the collision volume",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "No longer calls UpdateResource when changing texture LOD settings for render targets. This fixes the water brush breaking landscape after switching between desktop mobile preview mode and desktop renderer.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed landscape legacy weight blending potentially leaving ghost weightmaps on large landscapes.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Turned assert about landscape physical material tasks failing to complete on save into an error, since that is something that can happen if the material fails to compile.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash that happened when trying to clear a Landscape Paint Target Layer that was already empty.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash when a Landscape Blueprint brush was deleted and then restored via Undo.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Removed spurious assert when the landscape material references a texture named \"Heightmap\" (implicit name for heightmaps in landscape).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed determinism issue when updating landscapes with conflicts on the border of landscape components that would lead to landscape proxies getting dirty in an inconsistent way.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue with World-Partition Landscape Proxy Nanite Materials not updating after using Undo/Redo with the Landscape Paint Tool.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed invalidations of landscape physical material during painting.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The last few frames of a paint stroke could be lost because the invalidations were ignored while a physical material task was still pending.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed several issues with ReinitializeHeight/Weights in landscape patches.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed crash with multiple patches. The render command recorder was not stopped at the right moment: both Render and Blend operations must respect the render mode (Immediate or Recorded), which could be broken in case the renderer was grouped with another one earlier.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed landscape that was not updated after having reinitialization had been executed.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash when the same patch is rendered in several batches. The boolean bReinitializeHeightOnNextRender does not support this and that supposes that during reinitialization, the patch is rendered in a single batch. The fix artificially increases the batch size to the entire landscape, which is wasteful, but the best we can do until the reinitialization is replaced by a proper landscape edit layer partial merge.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed landscape batched merge not handling multiple weight patches (i.e. multiple target layers) being rendered on the same patch component (the render targets would cycle in between each, leading to invalid blending).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed landscape patches' input area (which was the size of the patch), that would lead to needlessly large batches.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed potential determinism issue with landscape patches that could theoretically render before their referenced textures are fully streamed in.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Handle null landscape patch weight entries in the couple of places where it was not.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed invalid checks in landscape batched merge.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Stop over-invalidating on empty landscape components. Change to invalidating only components that added or removed weightmap allocations.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed PCG refresh on undo/redo landscape painting.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Moved creation of landscape nanite's UStaticMesh out to the game thread to remove danger of threading issues.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed improper blend of landscape edit layers with custom height/weight flags.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Avoided a crash if saving when FLandscapeTextureStreamingManager is not available.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a bad ensure condition when trying to cache data from an empty area in the landscape smooth/flatten/erosion tools.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash with the Landscape Copy Tool when attempting to copy data from an invalid or deleted landscape.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fix deleted landscape spline points/segments coming back after duplicating the spline.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash occurring when saving level instances that include World-Partition Landscapes.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed ctrl+alt+right click drag increasing/decreasing the landscape brush continuously even when the mouse was still.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed mobile landscape data hash being zeroed when entering PIE. That was leading to all landscape mobile data being rebuilt when entering PIE while in mobile preview mode.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a landscape flatten tool conflict with undo.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed landscape flatten tool behavior at the edges of geometry.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed landscape painting errors when toggling \"invert\" during a brush stroke.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue with the Landscape Resize tool clearing all heightmap/weightmap data for edit-layer based landscapes.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue with Water Bodies automatically generating invalid collision boxes in the Blueprint editor when changing the Wave Source property.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Prevented a crash when redoing an undo of a Water Zone actor deletion.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue with the Landscape Resize tool using the wrong Y position offset while expanding the landscape.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed the handling of changing transforms when building landscape groups.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed additive blend mode for landscape texture patches.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed various landscape+water new cases where it was assumed that GetWorld() returns a valid world while it's not the case when a world is deleted from the content browser.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Improved the Landscape Import/Export Exposed user experience by exposing the Landscape Gizmo location property to the Landscape details panel.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash updating landscape edge snapshots when heightmaps are not readable.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fix landscape edit layers merge on Vulkan SM6.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash when renaming a Landscape Paint Target Layer to an invalid name. Target Layer names must be unique non-empty names.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Keep landscape patches in sync with their host landscape by upgrading them from the soft-dirty package list to regular dirty status when the landscape makes that same change.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Enabled landscape grass culling when running MRQ.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Previously we would pass an array of no camera to RegenerateGrass, which prevents all landscape grass from being distance-culled.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Instead, we now pass nothing, which leads landscape to use the streaming manager to get the current \"views\", one of which is the captured camera (the other, the editor).",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "This is better handled in the new movie render graph but at least this solves a performance issue in grass-heavy scenes. The user can now override the grass cull distance (as well as grass density) via Game Overrides settings.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Default = override + cull distance multiplier of 50, to have (mostly) backwards compatibility with the previous MRQ captures (which prevented all grass culling) The default for grass density override is false, though, also for backwards compatibility reasons.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Note that the new movie render graph doesn't have these settings since it doesn't have them for ViewDistanceScale, ShadowDistanceScale, etc. so we figured it didn't need those grass settings either.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Also added a CVar (grass.VisualLog.ShowCameraLocation) to show the camera locations used by landscape grass in the visual logger.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Now displays an error message instead of crashing when failing to import an image file to a landscape layer.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Avoided a crash on opening a scene containing the legacy LandscapePatchManager when the scene was already at the max number of edit layers. Ignore the soft limit when creating the new dedicated patch layer.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed OOBB-&gt;AABB computation in landscape batched merge, which was leading to bad blend groups for landscape patches.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue with landscape brushes that would sometimes modify height/weight data on the border with unloaded tiles.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Avoided a crash when opening a map with a disconnected landscape patch manager, when the editor isn't ready to provide the current selection set.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fix for Nanite landscape possibly generating invalid Nanite mesh streaming data on cook.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added an option for landscape Blueprint brushes to tell if they require power-of-2 render targets to operate. For backwards compatibility reasons, it's set to true by default, although it's not the best option. This ensures that the water brush behaves precisely how it used to before UE 5.6",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed the water brush on Vulkan SM5.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue where Landscapes only generate Nanite for the first 64 components of any given landscape proxy.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fix missing landscape spline meshes after undo of merger of two splines.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Now hides the landscape selector when the New tool in the Manage panel is active.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a rare crash in the landscape texture streaming manager when landscape textures are GCed while the landscape is still active.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed missing updates to landscape physical material when using a material instance.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash using Undo operation with a Landscape Patch and Patch Edit Layer.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Landscape add component tool fixes:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Now properly generates extrapolated height data on each persistent edit layer, so that there's continuity on the corners on each of them.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "No longer generates collisions on component creation because at this point, the height data is set to all zeroes (i.e. the minimum height, not the median, default height value) and doesn't correspond to what comes out of the the subsequent edit layers merge, whose readback would generate an identical heightmap hash, and would therefore not re-generate collisions. Delaying collision generation until the merge fixes this, since that's the first time the collision values would be valid anyway.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Now prevents existing neighboring components from being dirtied when adding a new component (previously they would get dirty by the simple act of caching/interpolating their height data).",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Automatically apply splines after component creation, so that new components are immediately affected by the splines that overlap with them.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Improved visualizer for the component about to be added.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Prevent landscape edge fixup from running on world composition maps, where heightmap sharing is still possible.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed all logs involving landscape LandcapeGroupKey and LODGroupKey.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed ensure loading old landscape data with landscape.StripLayerMipsOnLoad = false.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash occurring after exiting a level instance with the Landscape Editor - Landscape Copy tool active.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Deprecated:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Deprecated legacy non-edit layer landscapes:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Removed all editor tooling related to non-edit layer landscapes (e.g. Landscape Retopologize Tool/XY Offset data).",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Disabled the creation of non-edit layer landscapes and the ability to toggle between edit layers and non-edit layer landscapes.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "When non-edit layer landscapes are loaded, an automatic conversion to an edit layer based landscape occurs. During this process, all proxies copy the existing non-edit layer data to a new default edit layer. Any existing Retopologize data is removed and the proxy is flagged as \"soft dirty\" with an editor viewport warning.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Removed global and local merge code and deprecated anything that was only available for this.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Since the console variable \"landscape.EditLayersLocalMerge.Enable\" is deprecated now, a new console command was added, to trigger a landscape layer full update (landscape.ForceLayersFullUpdate) :",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                },
                {
                  "type": "enhanced_list",
                  "style": "unordered",
                  "items": [
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "With no argument: Updates all landscapes.",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ],
                    [
                      {
                        "type": "paragraph",
                        "content": "With arguments: Updates all landscapes whose display name (partially) matches the argument (e.g. with 3 landscapes named Landscape_0 Landscape_1 and Landscape_2, \"landscape.ForceLayersFullUpdate _0 _1\" will trigger an update on the first 2 only)",
                        "settings": {
                          "is_hidden": false
                        }
                      }
                    ]
                  ],
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Changed landscape edit layers merge API from experimental to official.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Removed landscape's \"intermediate render\" code path.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Modeling Tools",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for the tangents tool to choose the reference UV layer to use when computing tangents.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added BrushValue property to the AttributePaintTool to allow users to specify the target value that is painted down rather than always accumulating to 1.0f.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added symmetry support to the Paint Vertex tool.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "The target requirements for the Inspect tool have been relaxed to support DynamicMeshProviders rather than MeshDescriptionProviders.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Modify UBoundarySelectionMechanic to be able to operate on either closed loops (current behavior) or open spans (new optional behavior).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Lattice Deformer Tool:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Modified the FFDLattice to optionally accept an oriented bounding box rather than computing one from the input mesh. This means the lattice can operate on just a portion of the mesh. Lattice computations are now all done in local space.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added an ILatticeStateStorage interface, which enables the interactive LatticeDeformerTool to store its state in when the tool ends.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for a HitBackfaces option to the MeshAttributePaintTool.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "The attribute paint tool now has the option to use a more-shaded material.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added an option to the Mirror tool to averaging normals along the weld.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash on attempting to split meshes w/ invalid material IDs.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue where the AttributePaintTool's stamps would be skewed for meshes with non-uniform scale.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed where modeling tools could incorrectly change material ID assignments due to the static mesh tool target 'IMeshDescriptionCommitter' interface not finding the right material ID mapping method.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "The same function is also on the Provider, so needed to be pulled to the top level for both interfaces to find the method.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Made vertex sculpt tool skip render decomp step if the sculpt mesh has no triangles (fixing ensure when tool is run on an empty mesh).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash in the subdivide tool. We were passing in the wrong vertex count to OpenSubdiv.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a potential crash when enabling UVLayoutPreview.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a warning about realtime mode erroneously appearing in modeling and scriptable tools modes when the editor doesn't have focus.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a potential crash in DisplaceMeshTool for meshes with invalid topology.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a GC crash with mesh element selection's usage of PreviewGeometry.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed support of the 'join method' for closed curves in the Mesh Splines tool (previously always used 'square' joins).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash on starting modeling mode w/ an actor selected that has null components attached.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a crash when swapping from Modeling Mode to Animation Mode with Motion Trails active.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a potential crash in the ISM Editor tool.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a potential nullptr dereference crash in OnActiveViewportChanged for StylusHandling.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed the OutputType properties' display name and tooltip to SourceType in the BakeVertex tool to better reflect the function of those properties.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue where tools in Modeling Mode and Scriptable Tools Mode would not tick if the viewport did not receive focus yet during the editor session.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fix for crash in Extrude Path tool when creating a totally straight polyline.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a rare crash when hovering over Mesh Element Selection before viewport is focused.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed Mesh Splines tool handling of duplicate start/end points generated on looping splines, which could previously cause incorrect triangulations.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Lattice Deformer Op: Fixed a check that fires when operating on non-compact meshes.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an issue where the Union tool only transferred UV Channel 0 in the result mesh.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed a potential crash in TDynamicVector::TruncateBlocks for an empty vector.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a workaround to prevent a crash in UVAtlas.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Normal seams on dynamic meshes are now automatically hard edges when converted to mesh description, which can better preserve sharp features when the dynamic mesh is used for editing a static mesh or skeletal mesh asset.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Reduced confusion during displace tool computations by adding a slight delay to the appearance of the 'in progress' material.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Addressed a bug which displayed random gizmo orientation in local space in the PolyEdit tool.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an error in AddSingleClickBehavior and AddDoubleClickBehavior function tooltip.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed the StaticMeshSelector only working on exactly StaticMeshComponents.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "header",
      "content": "Procedural",
      "level": 4,
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>New:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added \"SetWorldObject\" on the PCG Data Exporter for Blueprints.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Objects can't be cast to World in Blueprints, and when doing an utility widget, Get Selected Assets returns an array of objects.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Does the cast internally, returns false if the cast fails.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for skeletal meshes in BoundsFromMesh and PointFromMesh.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Deprecate StaticMesh property to Mesh property in PointFromMesh, with override alias",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a new \"Extract Attribute\" node to extract any attribute from any data and domain.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Factorized code for Get Attribute From Point Index.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Get Attribute From Point Index now works with data domains too.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added the Polygon2D data type, that represents a 2d polygon (e.g. on a plane), with an additional transform. Has some polygon specific metadata properties on both the data domain and the vertex domains.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added Python Interop Plugin and Execute Python Script Node.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Stand up the Break Debugger debug feature for GPU nodes, and make the breakpoint conditional on inspection so that it is usable in partitioned/higen use cases.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed multiple performance bugs where GPU-resident data is unnecessarily read back when passing through Change Grid Size nodes.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added toggle to GPU nodes to trigger render captures for debugging (editor only).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added GPU processor node for Attribute Sets.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed runtime generation bug where changing Partition Grid Size setting on PCGWorldActor resulted in generated actors being leaked into the level.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added re-nameable categories for organization in Graph Parameters + Includes Drag and Drop.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Improved priority calculation in distance and direction runtime generation policy to behave more uniformly across grid sizes and to be easier to tweak.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Note: May require re-tweaking if non-default weights were in use.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added Generate Landscape Textures node that can generate a height map as well as grass maps from the landscape. This path does not rely on virtual textures, and is significantly more efficient than the CPU path.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added LLM tags for tracking memory allocations.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a get segment node that allows the user to retrieve a segment from a polygon 2d, spline or point data, in the form of two points or a spline containing a single segment. Support negative indices (-1 being the last segment) in all cases and hole support for polygons.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added 'Clip Paths' node to cut paths (points or splines) with clipping polygons. Supports either difference or intersection.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Add new property for data that supports elements: @Data.$NumElements.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Useful to combine with Filter Data by Attribute.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added the concept of read-only for properties in the Selector menu to not show for output.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Applied this concept to Polygon2D properties.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for property remap when converting back and forth between Attribute Set and Points",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Saves adding \"Copy Attribute\" nodes to do the conversions.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added option to disable default input creation for top-level graphs. Will become default eventually.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Improvements on Boolean and Bitwise op.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Boolean op now supports arithmetic types as input, still produces a bool as output.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added operators NAND, NOR, XNOR, IMPLY, NIMPLY.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added ShiftLeft/Right for Bitwise.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added \"AddModulo\" operation in maths node.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Do operation (A + B) % C .",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Useful to get the ($Index + 1) % NumPoints.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added comma-separated tag list (override) to create target actor node.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added polygon offset functionality (offset positive or negative, open and close holes).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added polygon operations (intersection, difference, union, inner intersection, exclusive or, cut polygon with paths).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added GPU implementation of Transform Points.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added change detection to runtime generation state to throttle scans over grid cells, saving per-frame Game Thread cost.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added 'Split Spline' node to split splines based on a few criteria (key, distance, alpha) or on a predicate on control points.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Add `IsBuilder` to Get Execution Context node.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Needed to know which component the builder was scheduling.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added that information to the PCG Editor Module, which can be queried through IPCGEditorModule.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Add helper function to get the result from the IPCGEditorModule.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added support for attribute curve remap.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added a new mode in the existing attribute remap node.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added an alias for curve remap.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Also exposed ExternalCurve for the spline sampler (with the new PCG_OverridableChildProperties).",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a 'Spline Intersection' node that computes intersections between splines (in 3d).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added a debug feature that repeatedly dispatches the compute graph to enable profiling, compiled out by default (PCG_GPU_KERNEL_PROFILING).",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added String Contains and Matches nodes and .Length extractor + Extractor:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": ".Length - Length of the string",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Contains - Whether string A contains substring B",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Matches - Whether string A matches string B exactly",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added Cvar pcg.GPU.FuzzMemory which initializes GPU buffers to random values during execution to help catch uninitialized data bugs and other undefined or unreliable behaviour.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added the ability to retrieve the ray hit material with GetMaterialFromCollisionFaceIndex, instead of needing to specify a material index.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "StructUtils: Added new features to the Property Bag Details View Child Row Widget:",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Customizable via the EPropertyBagChildRowFeatures enum (set via metadata specifier).",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "New STypeSelector widget (wrapper around SPinTypeSelector) for type selection.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "New Access Specifier button.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "New drop down menu.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added 'Get Asset List' node to get assets from a folder or from a collection. Can extract asset classes and generated classes when these are blueprints too.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Anim - SkinnedMesh: Exposed SkinnedAsset and TransformProvider on FSoftSkinnedMeshComponentDescriptor.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "To have parity with the non-soft version.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "To be used for the Instanced Skinned Mesh Spawner in PCG.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Nanite Assemblies: Initial prototype of Nanite Assemblies builder to support creating Static Meshes.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Interop plugin, as this is still very experimental.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Added specific graph cache enabled and budget CVars for editor worlds vs game worlds.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Can now override nested properties in the Static/Skinned Mesh Spawner.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ]
      ],
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "paragraph",
      "content": "<b>Bug Fix:</b>",
      "settings": {
        "is_hidden": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "enhanced_list",
      "style": "unordered",
      "items": [
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed multiple cook warnings arising from GPU node kernels.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed bugs with CreateGrid2D and CreateGrid3D Custom HLSL helper functions where the NumRows/NumCols arguments were not used correctly.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed Filter Elements by Index node's indexing issue.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Now supports Attribute Rename for Selectors and Data domain.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Improvements to Spline Mesh spawning.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Component class is now respected when spawning the spline mesh.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Added override on the component itself, if users have special fields they want to fill.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed an outstanding issue in package build where the Switch and MultiSelect nodes can fail if the DisplayName is different from the real name for an EnumValue.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "GetDisplayName won't return the display name in package build but the real name.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ],
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Since we use the Display name for naming the pins, we need to keep a mapping.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed Create Points Sphere crash from divide-by-zero when graph params are used to set degrees to 0.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fix bool attribute in Write to Niagara Data Channel.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "enhanced_list",
            "style": "unordered",
            "items": [
              [
                {
                  "type": "paragraph",
                  "content": "Writing bool values was crashing.",
                  "settings": {
                    "is_hidden": false
                  }
                }
              ]
            ],
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed bug causing Inline Constant not to respect required pin.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
        ],
        [
          {
            "type": "paragraph",
            "content": "Fixed Per data CRC caching issue when there are N:N mappings, which was the case in some configurations of the Match & Set node and the Distance node.",
            "settings": {
              "is_hidden": false
            }
          }
